mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A declining unemployment rate signals stronger labor market conditions, increasing corporate profit margins and consumer spending, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns in periods of declining UNRATE are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or UNRATE declines are followed by negative returns in > 40% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates stronger manufacturing activity, which boosts corporate earnings and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods of rising INDPRO are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or INDPRO growth is followed by negative returns in > 35% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP and declining inflation signals a strong economic expansion with stable pricing, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal of GDPC1 growth > 2% and CPIAUCSL decline > 0.5% fails to produce positive 20-day returns in > 50% of cases or Rank IC < 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in the federal funds rate signals monetary tightening, which raises borrowing costs and reduces equity valuations, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 5-day returns in periods of FEDFUNDS increases > 0.5% in 1 month are not significantly negative (t-test p > 0.05) or the signal fails in > 40% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A surge in housing starts indicates strong demand for residential construction, boosting related industries and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns during housing market expansions.
failure_condition: SPX 20-day returns in periods of HOUST increases > 10% in 3 months are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05) or the signal fails in > 35% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in payrolls and declining unemployment signals a robust labor market, which increases consumer spending and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal of PAYEMS growth > 100k and UNRATE decline > 0.3% fails to produce positive 60-day returns in > 50% of cases or Rank IC < 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production combined with low inflation indicates efficient supply chains and stable pricing, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal of INDPRO increase > 1% and CPIAUCSL < 2% fails to produce positive 5-day returns in > 50% of cases or Rank IC < 0.02.
